description:
On the event of the first ever International Yoga Day, held on 21st June, 2015, healer Sakhashree Neeta explains the importance of Chakra Balancing and how practicing yoga helps in discovering inner consciousness and achieves inner awakening.


Find out more videos at https://www.youtube.com/user/rudracentre/videos
